tags.label: Talking
positive: a person talking directly to a camera
an interview or conversation

tags.label: Tutorial
positive: a person teaching or demonstrating a process
a step by step tutorial

tags.label: Performance
positive: a person performing for a camera or audience
a staged music or dance performance

tags.label: Gaming
positive: a person playing a video game
video game footage or a gaming stream
negative: a person not playing a game

tags.label: Cooking
positive: a person preparing food in a kitchen
cooking or baking food
negative: a person away from a kitchen

tags.label: Fitness
positive: a person exercising or working out
fitness training or yoga
negative: a person resting or talking without exercise

tags.label: Solo
positive: one person alone in the scene
a solo presentation by one person

tags.label: Pair
positive: two people together in the scene
a pair of people together

tags.label: Group
positive: three or more people together
a group or crowd of people

tags.label: Indoor
positive: a scene inside a room or studio
an indoor setting

tags.label: Outdoor
positive: a scene outdoors in daylight
people outside in a natural setting

tags.label: POV
positive: a scene filmed from first person point of view
a first person camera view
negative: a full body view from a distance

tags.label: Close-up
positive: a close-up camera crop
a subject filmed very close to the camera
negative: a distant view of a room
